imageurl.title: Login
imageurl.description: Secure authentication screen that allows authorized users to log in using valid credentials, ensuring system safety and access control.

imageurl.title: Dashboard
imageurl.description: Centralized dashboard offering a real-time overview of inventory status, recent transactions, alerts, and key performance metrics.

imageurl.title: Invoice Entry
imageurl.description: Invoice management module to create, edit, and track purchase and sales invoices with accurate item and pricing details.

imageurl.title: Product Image Upload
imageurl.description: Feature that allows users to upload and manage product images, improving item identification and inventory visualization.

imageurl.title: Invoice Quantity Verification
imageurl.description: Verification screen to validate invoice quantities against available stock, reducing errors and ensuring accurate inventory records.

imageurl.title: Indent Transfer Entry
imageurl.description: Module for recording and managing stock transfers between departments or locations through structured indent entries.

imageurl.title: Access Policy Report
imageurl.description: Report screen displaying user access policies and permission levels to ensure compliance and controlled system usage.

imageurl.title: Dynamic Stock Report
imageurl.description: Interactive stock reporting module that provides real-time insights into inventory levels, movement trends, and availability.

description: This inventory management system features a comprehensive set of modules designed to streamline operations, enhance accuracy, and provide real-time insights into inventory status. From secure login and centralized dashboards to detailed invoice management and dynamic stock reporting, the system offers robust functionality for efficient inventory control and decision-making.
